implemented_now: added deterministic run-graph reconstruction engine that derives a DAG strictly from ledger events plus run artifact metadata and validates node/edge contracts
protocol run-ledger finalize now emits run-level run_graph.json artifacts under runs/<session_id>/run_graph.json using reconstructed run-finalized event state
added canonical run graph schema contract at core/artifacts/run_graph_schema.json and registered run_graph.json in the artifact schema registry
added contract and integration coverage for reproducibility/idempotency, artifact-lineage integrity, compatibility-expansion edges, golden reconstruction, and deterministic live-vs-replay parity
